title: Briny Dutch Carnaroli Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful rice pilaf dish infused with the brininess of Dutch cheese and the mild taste of carnaroli rice.

ingredients.name: pilaf seasoning
ingredients.notes: e.g., dried herbs like thyme or rosemary

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: e.g., sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the carnaroli rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the pilaf seasoning and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is tender.
Stir in the crumbled briny cheese and grated Dutch cheese.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
